subcodes.first_line: May my spirit be sacrificed for your presence! Such was the intensity of the heat that descended upon this frame in this year, causing weakness and enervation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحضرتکم الفداء آنچه گرمی هوا در این سنه بر جسد سرایت کرد و علت ضعف
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
